items.title: Mental health in tennis: a cross-organisational hybrid summit-Delphi consensus process
items.summary: A multimethod consensus process, including an in-person summit and Delphi process, generated recommendations for mental healthcare and wellness promotion among elite tennis athletes, including juniors, involving 83 participants from diverse tennis organizations.
items.curatedReason: 这份共识文件为网球界精英运动员（包括青少年）心理健康护理和健康促进提供了建议。如果你在网球领域工作，这些建议可以作为你构建和实施心理健康支持项目的重要指导，涵盖多学科合作和不同层级运动员的需求。
items.titleZh: 网球领域的心理健康：一项跨组织混合峰会-德尔菲共识流程
items.summaryZh: 一项多方法共识流程，包括一次现场峰会和德尔菲法，为精英网球运动员（包括青少年）的心理健康护理和健康促进提供了建议，涉及来自不同网球组织的 83 名参与者。
items.curatedReasonEn: This consensus on mental healthcare and wellness promotion for elite tennis athletes offers a multidisciplinary framework. When designing support programs for tennis players, reference these recommendations to ensure comprehensive coverage for athletes at various levels.

items.title: Incidence of injury and illness at the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games: post-pandemic trends and sport-specific risks
items.summary: A prospective observational study monitored 4450 athletes during the 2024 Paris Paralympic Games, reporting 535 injuries (incidence of 8.6 per 1000 athlete days) and sport-specific risks, with Taekwondo and football 5-a-side showing the highest rates.
items.curatedReason: 2024 年巴黎残奥会的伤病数据为你指明了高风险项目（如跆拳道和五人制足球）。你在为残疾运动员制定运动康复和预防策略时，需要特别关注这些专项风险。
items.titleZh: 2024 年巴黎残奥会伤病和疾病发生率：疫情后趋势和专项运动风险
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性观察研究在 2024 年巴黎残奥会期间监测了 4450 名运动员，报告了 535 例伤病（发生率为每 1000 运动员日 8.6 例）和专项运动风险，其中跆拳道和五人制足球发生率最高。
items.curatedReasonEn: Injury data from the Paris 2024 Paralympic Games highlights high-risk sports (e.g., Taekwondo and football 5-a-side). When developing sports rehabilitation and prevention strategies for Para athletes, pay special attention to these specific risks.
items.limitation: 数据采集范围仅限于赛期，无法涵盖赛前训练和赛后恢复阶段的伤病情况。
items.limitationEn: The data collection was limited to the Games period, not covering injuries and illnesses during pre-Games training or post-Games recovery.

items.title: GaitEncoder: A Foundation Model of Gait Kinematics for Diverse Clinical Applications and Pathologies
items.summary: GaitEncoder is a generative foundation model for gait kinematics that leverages smartphone video-based gait analysis across 8 datasets (6500+ participants) for diverse clinical applications and pathologies, enabling actionable insights for personalized treatment.
items.curatedReason: GaitEncoder 模型是一个步态运动学基础模型，它通过手机视频分析，能应用于多种临床病理和评估任务。这款工具可能改变你对步态分析的传统认知，使定量步态评估更易于临床整合，为个性化治疗提供可操作的见解。
items.titleZh: GaitEncoder：一个用于多样临床应用和病理的步态运动学基础模型
items.summaryZh: GaitEncoder 是一个用于步态运动学的生成式基础模型，利用智能手机视频步态分析，跨越 8 个数据集（6500+ 名参与者），应用于多样化的临床应用和病理学，为个性化治疗提供可操作的见解。
items.curatedReasonEn: The GaitEncoder model is a foundational gait kinematics model that uses smartphone video analysis for various clinical pathologies and assessment tasks. This tool could transform your traditional approach to gait analysis, making quantitative gait assessment easier to integrate clinically and providing actionable insights for personalized treatment.
items.limitation: 该模型仍在预印本阶段，尚未经过同行评审和正式出版，其稳定性和长期有效性有待验证。
items.limitationEn: As a preprint, the model has not yet undergone peer review and formal publication; its stability and long-term effectiveness require validation.

items.title: Cost-effectiveness of Pilates compared with home-based exercises for people with chronic non-specific low back pain: a trial-based economic evaluation.
items.summary: An economic evaluation alongside an RCT (n=145) in Brazil found Pilates to be similar to home-based exercises for chronic non-specific low back pain in terms of clinical outcomes, with cost-effectiveness still under investigation.
items.curatedReason: 对慢性非特异性腰痛患者，普拉提与居家锻炼相比，在巴西医疗系统背景下成本效益数据仍稀缺。这项随机对照试验的经济学评估发现，普拉提在改善功能和减轻疼痛方面可能与居家锻炼相似，但成本效益仍需进一步研究确认。
items.titleZh: 普拉提与居家锻炼治疗慢性非特特异性腰痛的成本效益：一项基于试验的经济学评估
items.summaryZh: 一项在巴西进行的 RCT (n=145) 的经济学评估发现，普拉提在慢性非特异性腰痛的临床结果方面与居家锻炼相似，成本效益尚待进一步研究。
items.curatedReasonEn: For chronic non-specific low back pain, cost-effectiveness data comparing Pilates with home-based exercises are scarce in the Brazilian context. This economic evaluation alongside an RCT found Pilates may be similar to home exercises in improving function and reducing pain, but further research is needed to confirm cost-effectiveness.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于巴西医疗系统背景，其成本效益结果可能不适用于其他国家。
items.limitationEn: The study's cost-effectiveness findings are specific to the Brazilian healthcare system and may not be generalizable to other countries.

items.title: Acute Modulation of Lumbar Motor Unit Behavior During Experimentally Induced Low Back Pain: A Motor Unit Decomposition Analysis.
items.summary: An observational study on 33 healthy participants with experimentally induced acute low back pain investigated its effects on lumbar motor unit discharge characteristics and force steadiness during spinal extension.
items.curatedReason: 急性腰痛可能改变运动单位放电特性和发力稳定性。在评估这类患者时，你要警惕其运动控制的潜在改变，这关系到你如何制定更有效的康复策略。
items.titleZh: 实验诱导急性腰痛期间腰部运动单位行为的急性调节：一项运动单位分解分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 33 名健康参与者进行实验诱导急性腰痛的观察研究，调查了其对脊柱伸展过程中腰部运动单位放电特征和力量稳定性的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Acute low back pain may alter motor unit discharge characteristics and force steadiness. When assessing these patients, be alert to potential changes in motor control, which will inform your rehabilitation strategy.
items.limitation: 研究为实验诱导的急性腰痛，可能无法完全反映真实临床情境下的慢性或特发性腰痛表现。
items.limitationEn: The study used experimentally induced acute low back pain, which may not fully reflect chronic or idiopathic low back pain in real clinical settings.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Exploration of lifestyle interventions for individuals with knee osteoarthritis: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review synthesizing 36 studies (including 29 RCTs) explored the range, characteristics, and outcome measures of lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis, such as exercise and weight management.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述系统地梳理了膝骨关节炎的非药物生活方式干预。在为膝骨关节炎患者提供治疗方案时，你可以从中获取最新证据，了解不同干预措施的范围和有效性。
items.titleZh: 膝骨关节炎患者生活方式干预的探索：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述综合了 36 项研究（包括 29 项 RCT），探索了膝骨关节炎（如运动和体重管理）生活方式干预的范围、特征和结果测量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review systematically maps non-pharmacological lifestyle interventions for knee osteoarthritis. When developing treatment plans for knee OA patients, you can use this evidence to understand the range and effectiveness of various interventions.
items.limitation: 范围综述不进行质量评估或综合效应量分析，无法提供干预措施的证据等级或具体效果大小。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it does not include quality assessment or effect size synthesis, thus cannot provide evidence grades or specific magnitudes of intervention effects.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Prevalence, Patterns, Treatment Outcomes and Costs of Physiotherapy-Managed Musculoskeletal Disorders in Nigeria.
items.summary: A 10-year retrospective study of 1582 patients at a Nigerian University Teaching Hospital assessed the prevalence, patterns, treatment effectiveness, and cost of physiotherapy for musculoskeletal disorders.
items.curatedReason: 这项来自尼日利亚的回顾性研究揭示了该地区肌肉骨骼疾病的流行模式、治疗效果和成本。虽然研究数据来自单一机构且为回顾性，但它为你在非洲特定地区执业或研究时提供了重要参考，了解当地的疾病负担和资源配置。
items.titleZh: 尼日利亚物理治疗管理的肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗结果和成本
items.summaryZh: 一项在尼日利亚大学教学医院对 1582 名患者进行的为期 10 年的回顾性研究，评估了物理治疗管理肌肉骨骼疾病的患病率、模式、治疗效果和成本。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study from Nigeria sheds light on the prevalence, treatment outcomes, and costs of musculoskeletal disorders in the region. Although the data is from a single institution and retrospective, it offers important insights for your practice or research in specific African contexts, informing an understanding of local disease burden and resource allocation.
items.limitation: 回顾性研究，数据质量和完整性可能受限，且仅代表单一大学教学医院的经验，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective study, data quality and completeness may be limited. Findings are also specific to a single university teaching hospital, limiting generalizability.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Physical therapy protocols for patients with a megaprosthesis after bone tumor resection.
items.summary: Physical therapy protocols were developed through an explorative literature search and two consensus procedures with orthopedic oncologic surgeons and physical therapists for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection.
items.curatedReason: 这份基于专家共识的物理治疗方案为骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体患者提供了循证指导。当你遇到这类复杂病例时，这份方案可以作为你制定康复计划的起点，但请记住仍需结合个体情况进行调整。
items.titleZh: 骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案
items.summaryZh: 通过文献探索和骨科肿瘤外科医生及物理治疗师的两次共识会议，制定了骨肿瘤切除术后巨型假体患者的物理治疗方案。
items.curatedReasonEn: This expert consensus-based physical therapy protocol provides evidence-based guidance for patients with megaprostheses after bone tumor resection. When encountering such complex cases, this protocol can serve as a starting point for your rehabilitation planning, but remember to tailor it to individual patient needs.
items.limitation: 方案基于专家共识，而非高质量随机对照试验，证据等级相对较低。
items.limitationEn: The protocols are based on expert consensus rather than high-quality randomized controlled trials, resulting in a relatively lower level of evidence.

items.title: In safe hands - patients with knee and hip osteoarthritis expectations and experience of physical therapist-led triage in a secondary care setting.
items.summary: An explorative qualitative study in a Swedish orthopedic clinic explored the expectations and experiences of hip or knee OA patients regarding PT-led triage, using in-depth interviews.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导的分诊的期望和体验。在提供分诊服务时，请关注患者对参与决策和评估期望的反馈，这有助于你优化服务流程，提升患者满意度。
items.titleZh: 安全之手——膝髋骨关节炎患者对二级护理中物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验
items.summaryZh: 一项在瑞典骨科诊所进行的探索性定性研究，通过深度访谈探讨了膝髋骨关节炎患者对物理治疗师主导分诊的期望和体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals knee and hip OA patients' expectations and experiences with PT-led triage. When providing triage services, pay attention to patient feedback regarding shared decision-making and assessment expectations to optimize your service delivery and improve patient satisfaction.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果基于瑞典单一骨科诊所的患者访谈，其发现可能不具有普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The qualitative findings are based on patient interviews from a single orthopedic clinic in Sweden, so the generalizability of results may be limited.

items.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of 605 individuals in a Swiss population-based cohort described sexual dysfunction and its risk factors during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项基于人群队列的描述性分析揭示了脊髓损伤（SCI）患者早期康复期间性功能障碍的分布和风险因素。你可以在康复评估和咨询中将性健康纳入考量，与患者沟通相关风险和潜在的干预措施。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤后早期康复期间的性功能：一项基于人群队列的描述性分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对瑞士 605 名脊髓损伤患者进行的横断面分析，描述了其早期康复期间性功能障碍的分布和风险因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This population-based descriptive analysis reveals the distribution and risk factors of sexual dysfunction during early rehabilitation for spinal cord injury (SCI). You should integrate sexual health into rehabilitation assessments and counseling, discussing relevant risks and potential interventions with patients.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面分析，无法确立因果关系，且数据来自瑞士的SCI中心，外推性可能受限。
items.limitationEn: As a cross-sectional analysis, it cannot establish causality. Data are also from Swiss SCI centers, which may limit generalizability.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Sexual function during primary rehabilitation after spinal cord injury: A descriptive analysis from a population-based cohort

items.title: "My aim is to contribute to a meaningful life." Experiences of physiotherapists treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain-a qualitative study.
items.summary: Eight individual interviews with physiotherapists explored their experiences treating children and adolescents with cerebral palsy experiencing pain, focusing on influences on clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 这份定性研究探讨了物理治疗师治疗脑瘫（CP）儿童疼痛的经验。在临床实践中，你可以借鉴这些经验，更有效地与患儿建立信任，从身体体验入手理解和治疗疼痛，平衡专业责任与情感投入。
items.titleZh: “我的目标是帮助他们过上有意义的生活。” 物理治疗师治疗脑瘫患儿疼痛的经验：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 通过对 8 名物理治疗师的个人访谈，探讨了他们治疗经历疼痛的脑瘫儿童和青少年的经验，重点关注这些经验如何影响其临床实践。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores physical therapists' experiences treating pain in children with cerebral palsy (CP). In clinical practice, you can draw upon these insights to build trust with child patients, approach pain understanding and treatment from a bodily experience perspective, and balance professional responsibility with emotional engagement.
items.limitation: 研究为定性性质，样本量小（8名物理治疗师访谈），结果代表性有限，无法量化发现。
items.limitationEn: Being a qualitative study with a small sample (8 physiotherapist interviews), the findings have limited generalizability and are not quantifiable.

items.title: Building the foundations: organisational leadership for athlete mental health
items.summary: This commentary emphasizes the need for organizational leadership to build proactive mental health foundations for athletes, moving beyond reactive responses to crises and addressing the structural and cultural factors that inhibit help-seeking.
items.curatedReason: 这份评论强调了为运动员心理健康建立组织领导力的重要性，这超越了对危机事件的被动反应。在运动队或体育机构中执业时，你有责任推动主动的心理健康支持策略，而不仅仅是治疗现有的精神疾病。
items.titleZh: 建设基础：运动员心理健康的组织领导力
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论强调了组织领导力在为运动员建立积极心理健康基础方面的必要性，超越了对危机的被动反应，并解决了抑制求助行为的结构和文化因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary underscores the importance of establishing organizational leadership for athlete mental health, moving beyond reactive responses to crises. When working in sports teams or organizations, you have a responsibility to advocate for proactive mental health support strategies, not just treating existing conditions.

items.title: An mHealth intervention based on behavior change techniques to promote physical activity and nutrition in older patients with cancer: protocol for an N-of-1 trial
items.summary: This N-of-1 trial protocol describes an mHealth intervention using an ABA design to promote physical activity and nutritional behaviors in older patients with cancer (≥70 years), combining ecological momentary assessment with accelerometry.
items.curatedReason: 这项 N-of-1 试验方案描述了一种通过 mHealth 干预促进老年癌症患者活动和营养的方法。在为这类患者制定个性化康复时，可以考虑整合 mHealth 工具，以提升其依从性，即使试验结果尚未公布。
items.titleZh: 基于行为改变技术促进老年癌症患者体力活动和营养的移动健康干预：一项 N-of-1 试验方案
items.summaryZh: 该 N-of-1 试验方案描述了一项使用 ABA 设计的移动健康干预，旨在促进老年癌症患者（≥70 岁）的体力活动和营养行为，结合生态瞬时评估和加速度计。
items.curatedReasonEn: This N-of-1 trial protocol describes an mHealth intervention to promote activity and nutrition in older cancer patients. When developing personalized rehabilitation for this population, consider integrating mHealth tools to enhance adherence, even before trial results are published.
items.limitation: 该研究为试验方案，目前尚未发布具体结果，无法评估干预措施的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: This study is a trial protocol; specific results have not yet been published, so the actual effectiveness of the intervention cannot be assessed.

items.title: Early Access and Adherence to Physiotherapy in Children With Cerebral Palsy: Hospital-Based Study in Cameroon.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Cameroon (n=94) examined factors related to early access (before 5 months) and adherence (≥50% sessions) to physiotherapy services among children with cerebral palsy.
items.curatedReason: 这项在喀麦隆进行的医院研究揭示了脑瘫儿童早期接受物理治疗和依从性的相关因素。在评估和管理脑瘫儿童时，你应关注这些因素，尤其是早期干预和持续依从性，以期改善长期康复效果。
items.titleZh: 喀麦隆脑瘫儿童早期物理治疗可及性和依从性：一项医院研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在喀麦隆进行的设计为横断面研究 (n=94) 考察了脑瘫儿童早期（5个月前）接受物理治疗和治疗依从性（完成≥50%疗程）的相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This hospital-based study in Cameroon identifies factors related to early access and adherence to physiotherapy for children with cerebral palsy. When assessing and managing children with CP, you should consider these factors, especially early intervention and sustained adherence, to improve long-term rehabilitation outcomes.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法确定因果关系，且数据来自单一三级转诊中心，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents establishing causality, and data from a single tertiary referral center limit generalizability.
items.journal: Pediatric physical therapy : the official publication of the Section on Pediatrics of the American Physical Therapy Association

items.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (N=590) developed and validated a machine learning model to predict reduced exercise capacity 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery using perioperative clinical parameters at hospital discharge.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究提示，利用心脏手术出院时的临床参数，有望预测术后 3 个月运动不耐受。你应当关注其模型的验证结果，以判断其在临床上的实用性，从而可能改进高危患者的早期识别。
items.titleZh: 利用围手术期临床参数预测心血管手术后恢复期的运动不耐受
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究 (N=590) 开发并验证了一个机器学习模型，用于根据出院时的围手术期临床参数，预测心血管手术后 3 个月的运动能力下降。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that clinical parameters at discharge may predict exercise intolerance 3 months post-cardiovascular surgery. Pay attention to the model's validation to assess its clinical utility for potentially improving early identification of high-risk patients.
items.limitation: 研究为回顾性单中心队列研究，模型的通用性和外部验证尚待大规模前瞻性研究。
items.limitationEn: As a retrospective, single-center cohort study, the model's generalizability and external validation require larger prospective studies.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Prediction of Exercise Intolerance in the Recovery Period After Cardiovascular Surgery Using Perioperative Clinical Parameters

items.title: Exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe but not superior to a single session of physiotherapy for improving quality of life: a randomised trial.
items.summary: An assessor-blinded RCT found that 8-week group exercise-based telerehabilitation for cancer survivors was safe but not superior to a single in-person physiotherapy session in improving health-related quality of life.
items.curatedReason: 这项随机对照试验表明，尽管基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗评估和建议。在考虑远程康复方案时，应意识到其在某些结局上可能并非最优，但可作为一种可行的安全选择。
items.titleZh: 基于运动的癌症远程康复是安全的，但在改善生活质量方面并不优于单次物理治疗：一项随机试验
items.summaryZh: 一项评估者盲法随机对照试验发现，为期 8 周的基于团队运动的癌症幸存者远程康复是安全的，但在改善健康相关生活质量方面并不优于单次面对面物理治疗。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that while exercise-based cancer telerehabilitation is safe, it is not superior to a single session of physiotherapy assessment and advice for improving quality of life. When considering telerehabilitation options, be aware that it may not be optimal for certain outcomes, but it remains a viable and safe option.
items.limitation: 研究未发现远程康复优于单次面诊，但试验对照组仅接受单次评估和建议，可能低估了常规面对面康复的实际效果。
items.limitationEn: The study found no superiority of telerehabilitation over a single in-person session, but the control group only received a single assessment and advice, potentially underestimating the effect of regular in-person rehabilitation.

items.title: #Beyondthelikes: the influence of social media on athletes mental health
items.summary: This editorial explores the dual impact of social media on young athletes' mental health, highlighting both the risks of distress and opportunities for support, and suggests directions for research and practice.
items.curatedReason: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响。在与年轻运动员交流时，请帮助他们理解社交媒体的双重性——既有连接和支持的潜力，也有引发心理困扰的风险。你可以建议他们培养健康的使用习惯。
items.titleZh: #超越点赞：社交媒体对运动员心理健康的影响
items.summaryZh: 这篇社论探讨了社交媒体对年轻运动员心理健康的双重影响，强调了心理困扰的风险和支持的机会，并为研究和实践提供了方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This editorial discusses the influence of social media on athletes' mental health. When engaging with young athletes, help them understand the dual nature of social media—its potential for connection and support, as well as the risks of psychological distress. You can advise them on cultivating healthy usage habits.

items.title: Towards safer and smarter boxing: technology, health and performance
items.summary: This commentary advocates for integrating technology into professional boxing to improve athlete safety, health, and performance, moving beyond subjective judgments and traditional, intuition-based practices to better manage head impact risks.
items.curatedReason: 这篇评论讨论了在拳击运动中应用技术以提升安全性、健康和表现。作为运动康复专家，你可以关注如何利用新兴技术（如可穿戴设备、生物力学分析）来更客观地评估和管理运动员的健康与风险，从而推动这项运动的进步。
items.titleZh: 迈向更安全、更智能的拳击：技术、健康与表现
items.summaryZh: 这篇评论倡导将技术融入职业拳击，以提高运动员的安全性、健康和表现，超越主观判断和传统的、基于直觉的实践，从而更好地管理头部撞击风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary discusses applying technology in boxing to enhance safety, health, and performance. As a sports rehabilitation expert, you should explore how emerging technologies (e.g., wearables, biomechanical analysis) can objectively assess and manage athlete health and risk, thereby advancing the sport.

items.title: Infographic. Video analysis of muscle strains in sport: qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics across muscle groups
items.summary: This infographic illustrates video analysis techniques for understanding muscle strain injuries in sport, focusing on both qualitative (contact mechanisms, activities) and quantitative (joint angles, timing) situational characteristics to inform prevention and rehabilitation strategies.
items.curatedReason: 这份信息图提供了运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析，涵盖定性和定量情境特征。在评估和预防运动员肌肉拉伤时，你可以借鉴这种方法，通过精细的视频分析来识别具体的损伤机制和关键运动时刻，从而制定更有效的干预策略。
items.titleZh: 信息图。运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析：跨肌肉群的定性和定量情境特征
items.summaryZh: 这份信息图展示了运动中肌肉拉伤的视频分析技术，重点关注定性（接触机制、活动）和定量（关节角度、发生时间）情境特征，以指导预防和康复策略。
items.curatedReasonEn: This infographic presents video analysis of muscle strains in sport, including qualitative and quantitative situational characteristics. When assessing and preventing muscle strains in athletes, you can adopt this approach, using detailed video analysis to identify specific injury mechanisms and critical movement moments, thereby developing more effective intervention strategies.

items.title: Individual Prognostication of Emergence from Post-Traumatic Amnesia: A Nationwide Cohort Study
items.summary: A nationwide cohort study aims to predict individual emergence from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in patients with moderate to severe traumatic brain injury.
items.curatedReason: 这项全国性队列研究提示，可以预测中重度颅脑损伤患者的创伤后遗忘症（PTA）恢复情况。在管理这些患者时，关注其预测模型，这可能帮助你更准确地评估预后和调整康复计划。
items.titleZh: 创伤后遗忘症恢复的个体化预测：一项全国性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性队列研究旨在预测中度至重度创伤性脑损伤患者从创伤后遗忘症中恢复的个体化情况。
items.curatedReasonEn: This nationwide cohort study suggests that recovery from post-traumatic amnesia (PTA) in moderate to severe TBI patients can be predicted. When managing these patients, consider the predictive model, which may help you more accurately assess prognosis and adjust rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究为观察性队列，预测模型需进一步在独立、大规模前瞻性队列中进行外部验证。
items.limitationEn: As an observational cohort study, the predictive model requires further external validation in independent, large-scale prospective cohorts.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: On thin ice: balancing Olympic pursuits and long-term health
items.summary: This personal perspective from an Olympic ice skater discusses balancing the physical demands and competitive drive of elite sport with long-term health and personal identity, emphasizing the importance of intrinsic motivation over external aesthetics.
items.curatedReason: 这篇个人视角文章探讨了奥运选手如何在追求运动目标的同时平衡长期健康。在为高水平运动员提供康复和健康管理时，请记住运动的“血汗与泪水”之外，还有运动员的个人价值观和长远健康考量。
items.titleZh: 如履薄冰：平衡奥运追求与长期健康
items.summaryZh: 这篇来自奥运花样滑冰运动员的个人视角文章，探讨了在高水平运动的身体要求和竞争动力与长期健康和个人身份之间取得平衡，强调了内在动机而非外在美学的重要性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This personal perspective explores how Olympic athletes balance long-term health with athletic pursuits. When providing rehabilitation and health management for elite athletes, remember that beyond the "blood, sweat, and tears" of sport, there are also their personal values and long-term health considerations.

items.title: Patient Engagement, Clinical Outcomes, and Satisfaction of an Advanced Orthopedic Virtual Physical Therapy Model: A Retrospective Cohort Study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that an advanced orthopedic virtual physical therapy model achieved 62.8% evaluation completion and 70.9% care episode completion, with 96% of completers achieving Minimal Clinically Important Differences.
items.curatedReason: 虚拟物理治疗模式在骨科康复中展现了显著的依从性和临床效果。这提示远程医疗在解决地理可及性、提高患者参与度方面潜力巨大，值得你考虑纳入诊所服务模型。
items.titleZh: 先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型的患者参与度、临床结果和满意度：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究发现，先进骨科虚拟物理治疗模型实现了 62.8% 的评估完成率和 70.9% 的全程护理完成率，其中 96% 的完成者达到了最小临床重要差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Virtual physical therapy shows significant adherence and clinical effectiveness in orthopedic rehabilitation. This suggests telehealth has great potential in addressing geographical accessibility and enhancing patient engagement, making it a model worth considering for your practice.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在选择偏倚和混杂因素，无法确立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which may be subject to selection bias and confounding factors, thus preventing the establishment of causality.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Telerehabilitation during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors: A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified and mapped intervention models, outcome domains, and evidence gaps of telerehabilitation studies initiated during the hospital-to-home transition after a stroke, highlighting its potential and areas for further research.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围综述总结了卒中幸存者在“医院到家”过渡期间远程康复的干预模式和结果。它提供了远程医疗在神经康复中应用的概览，但提醒你在实践中需关注其证据空白，特别是对长期结局和特定亚组的有效性。
items.titleZh: 卒中幸存者从住院到居家过渡期间的远程康复：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别并绘制了卒中后从住院到居家过渡期间远程康复研究的干预模式、结局领域和证据空白，突出了其潜力和进一步研究的领域。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review summarizes telerehabilitation intervention models and outcomes during the hospital-to-home transition for stroke survivors. It provides an overview of telehealth applications in neurological rehabilitation but also highlights evidence gaps in practice, particularly regarding long-term outcomes and effectiveness in specific subgroups.
items.limitation: 作为一项范围综述，它旨在识别和映射证据，而非评估干预措施的有效性，因此未提供具体的效应量数据。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, its purpose is to identify and map evidence, not to evaluate intervention effectiveness, thus it does not provide specific effect size data.

items.title: Profile of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain: A cross-sectional study.
items.summary: A multicentre cross-sectional study characterized the demographic, clinical, and healthcare utilization profiles of patients attending private vestibular physiotherapy clinics in Spain, revealing limited access despite proven efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究描绘了西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者的特征。它揭示了尽管前庭康复有效，但转诊和可及性仍有限，这表明你可能需要更积极地向转诊医生和公众宣传前庭物理治疗的价值。
items.titleZh: 西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者概况：一项横断面研究
items.summaryZh: 一项多中心横断面研究描述了西班牙私人前庭物理治疗诊所患者的人口学、临床和医疗利用概况，揭示了尽管其疗效已获证实，但可及性仍有限。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study characterizes patients attending private vestibular physical therapy clinics in Spain. It reveals limited referrals and accessibility despite the proven efficacy of vestibular rehabilitation, suggesting you may need to more actively promote the value of vestibular physical therapy to referring physicians and the public.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法揭示患者特征与就诊模式之间的因果关系，且可能存在回忆偏倚。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents the establishment of causal relationships between patient characteristics and attendance patterns, and recall bias may be present.

items.title: Impact of lower limb proprioception on balance and gait in hemiparetic patients: biomechanical analysis.
items.summary: A biomechanical analysis investigated the associations between lower extremity proprioceptive impairments (foot sole sensation, position sense, and kinesthesia) and objective measures of balance and gait in hemiparetic individuals.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究量化了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍与平衡、步态参数之间的关联。你在评估偏瘫患者时，应更重视本体感觉的精细评估，并将其结果直接关联到平衡和步态训练方案的制定上。
items.titleZh: 下肢本体感觉对偏瘫患者平衡和步态的影响：生物力学分析
items.summaryZh: 一项生物力学分析研究了偏瘫患者下肢本体感觉障碍（足底感觉、位置觉和运动觉）与平衡和步态客观测量之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study quantifies the association between lower limb proprioceptive deficits and balance and gait parameters in hemiparetic patients. When assessing hemiparetic patients, you should place greater emphasis on detailed proprioceptive evaluation and directly link these results to the development of balance and and gait training programs.
items.limitation: 研究设计未明确说明，且未报告具体效应量，可能影响结果的临床可解释性。
items.limitationEn: The study design is not clearly specified, and specific effect sizes are not reported, which may affect the clinical interpretability of the results.

items.title: Effects of spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions on spatiotemporal gait parameters in stroke patients: A within-subject repeated-measures study.
items.summary: A within-subject repeated-measures study with 27 stroke patients found that spatial and temporal pre-verbal prioritized instructions differentially affected spatiotemporal gait parameters compared to a no-prioritization condition.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究明确了空间和时间优先口头指令对卒中患者步态参数的不同影响。在设计卒中步态训练时，你应该根据患者的具体不对称模式和治疗目标，更有针对性地选择空间或时间聚焦的口头指令。
items.titleZh: 空间和时间优先预言指令对卒中患者时空步态参数的影响：一项受试者内重复测量研究
items.summaryZh: 一项对 27 名卒中患者进行的受试者内重复测量研究发现，与无优先级条件相比，空间和时间优先的预言指令对时空步态参数产生了不同的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study clarified the differential effects of spatial and temporal prioritized verbal instructions on gait parameters in stroke patients. When designing stroke gait training, you should more specifically choose spatial or temporal focused verbal instructions based on the patient's specific asymmetry pattern and treatment goals.
items.limitation: 研究为单中心小样本（27 名卒中患者）的受试者内重复测量设计，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study utilized a single-center, small-sample (27 stroke patients) within-subject repeated-measures design, limiting its generalizability.

items.title: Feasibility of Integrating Music Therapy into Routine Speech-Language Rehabilitation for Post-Stroke Aphasia: A Real-World Outpatient Study.
items.summary: A quasi-experimental study found it feasible to integrate a structured music therapy protocol into conventional speech-language therapy for post-stroke aphasia in an outpatient setting in Thailand, exploring preliminary language performance outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项准实验研究虽然提示音乐疗法与常规言语治疗结合在卒中失语症患者中的可行性，并初步观察到语言表现改善，但鉴于其观察研究设计和小样本量，目前仍不足以推荐你将其作为常规干预。我们还需要更高级别的证据来确证其临床疗效。
items.titleZh: 将音乐疗法整合到卒中后失语症常规言语语言康复中的可行性：一项真实世界门诊研究
items.summaryZh: 一项准实验研究发现，在泰国门诊环境中将结构化音乐疗法方案整合到卒中后失语症的常规言语语言治疗中是可行的，并探讨了初步的语言表现结果。
items.curatedReasonEn: While this quasi-experimental study suggests the feasibility of integrating music therapy with conventional speech therapy for post-stroke aphasia, and observed preliminary language performance improvements, its observational design and small sample size mean it's insufficient to recommend as a routine intervention. We still need higher-level evidence to confirm its clinical efficacy.
items.limitation: 研究设计为准实验性，缺乏随机分组，可能存在组间基线不平衡和偏倚。此外，音乐疗法组的总体治疗时间增加，可能导致效果归因困难。
items.limitationEn: The study employed a quasi-experimental design, lacking randomization, which may lead to baseline imbalances and bias between groups. Additionally, the music therapy group received increased overall therapeutic contact time, making it difficult to attribute effects solely to music therapy.

items.title: Triceps Surae Neuromuscular Activity During Single-leg Jumping Tasks in Individuals After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction.
items.summary: A study compared triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks between individuals after ACL reconstruction and healthy controls, hypothesizing lower activity in the ACLR group.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现 ACL 重建术后患者单腿跳跃时比目鱼肌的肌电活动低于健康对照组。你在康复后期应更关注小腿三头肌的神经肌肉活动，尤其是比目鱼肌，以优化跳跃任务的表现，降低再损伤风险。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建术后个体单腿跳跃任务中比目鱼肌神经肌肉活动
items.summaryZh: 一项研究比较了前交叉韧带重建术后个体与健康对照组在单腿跳跃任务中比目鱼肌的肌电活动，假设 ACLR 组的活动较低。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found that triceps surae EMG activity during single-leg jumping tasks was lower in individuals after ACL reconstruction compared to healthy controls. In late-stage rehabilitation, you should pay more attention to the neuromuscular activity of the triceps surae, especially the soleus, to optimize jumping performance and reduce re-injury risk.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小，且未能明确交代对照组与 ACL 重建组的匹配细节，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The study sample size is relatively small, and the matching details between the control and ACL reconstruction groups are not clearly specified, which may affect the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Eight weeks of visual perturbation training effects on unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and errors in male athletes following anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction: a randomized controlled clinical trial (RCT).
items.summary: An RCT of 24 ACLR male athletes found that eight weeks of visual perturbation training improved unanticipated cutting lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors, addressing neuromuscular deficits not restored by traditional protocols.
items.curatedReason: 视觉扰动训练在 ACL 重建术后男性运动员中，改善了非预期切向动作的下肢生物力学并减少了错误。这意味着在重返赛场训练中，你应考虑引入这种认知-运动结合的训练模式，以解决传统训练未能充分恢复的神经肌肉缺陷。
items.titleZh: 八周视觉扰动训练对前交叉韧带重建术后男性运动员非预期切向动作下肢生物力学和错误的影响：一项随机对照临床试验（RCT）
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 24 名 ACLR 男性运动员的随机对照试验发现，八周的视觉扰动训练改善了非预期切向动作的下肢生物力学并减少了错误，解决了传统方案未能恢复的神经肌肉缺陷。
items.curatedReasonEn: Visual perturbation training improved lower-limb biomechanics and reduced errors during unanticipated cutting maneuvers in male athletes after ACL reconstruction. This suggests that in return-to-sport training, you should consider incorporating this cognitive-motor combined training model to address neuromuscular deficits not fully restored by traditional training.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于 ACL 重建术后的男性运动员，结果对女性运动员或其他人群的适用性可能有限。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to male athletes after ACL reconstruction, and the applicability of the findings to female athletes or other populations may be limited.

items.title: Factors Affecting Clinical Decision Making for Blood Flow Restriction Training in Pediatric and Adolescent Patients Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Injury.
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey explored factors affecting clinical decision-making for blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients following ACL injury, aiming to understand the concordance between research and clinical practice.
items.curatedReason: 这项调查揭示了物理治疗师在 ACL 损伤后儿童和青少年患者中使用血流限制训练（BFRT）的临床决策因素。这提示你在考虑为青少年患者使用 BFRT 时，需权衡患者的临床表现、安全性以及现有研究证据，并注意临床实践与研究之间的差距。
items.titleZh: 影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练临床决策的因素
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面调查研究探讨了影响前交叉韧带损伤后儿童和青少年患者血流限制训练（BFRT）临床决策的因素，旨在了解研究与临床实践之间的一致性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals factors influencing physical therapists' clinical decisions regarding blood flow restriction training (BFRT) in pediatric and adolescent patients post-ACL injury. This suggests that when considering BFRT for adolescent patients, you need to weigh the patient's clinical presentation, safety, and existing research evidence, while also noting the gap between clinical practice and research.
items.limitation: 这是一项横断面调查研究，依赖于物理治疗师的自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚，且无法建立因果关系。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on physical therapists' self-reports, which may be subject to recall and reporting bias, and cannot establish causality.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Effects of Dynamic Taping on Dynamic Balance and Proprioception in Recreational Athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability.
items.summary: A single-blind randomized controlled trial found that Dynamic Taping improved dynamic balance and proprioception in recreational athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability, potentially offering benefits over traditional sports taping.
items.curatedReason: 对于慢性踝关节不稳（CAI）的休闲运动员，动态贴扎在改善动态平衡和本体感觉方面似乎优于传统运动贴扎。考虑在你的 CAI 患者康复方案中加入动态贴扎，尤其是在他们需要保持一定活动度时，这可能是一个值得尝试的选项。
items.titleZh: 动态贴扎对慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员动态平衡和本体感觉的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲随机对照试验发现，动态贴扎改善了慢性踝关节不稳休闲运动员的动态平衡和本体感觉，可能比传统运动贴扎更有优势。
items.curatedReasonEn: For recreational athletes with Chronic Ankle Instability (CAI), Dynamic Taping appears to improve dynamic balance and proprioception better than traditional sports taping. Consider incorporating dynamic taping into your CAI rehabilitation protocols, especially when patients need to maintain some range of motion; it could be a valuable addition.
items.limitation: 研究仅评估了即时效果，缺乏长期随访数据来支持其在长期康复中的持续益处。
items.limitationEn: The study only evaluated immediate effects, lacking long-term follow-up data to support its sustained benefits in long-term rehabilitation.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Biomechanical effects of Kinesio versus Mulligan ankle taping on balance and ankle function in chronic STROKE: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial of 33 chronic stroke individuals found that Kinesio taping with treadmill training, and Mulligan taping with treadmill training, had significant group differences in ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion and other outcomes compared to treadmill training alone.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入 33 名慢性卒中患者的 RCT 提示，Kinesio 贴扎和 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎与跑步机训练结合，在改善踝关节背屈被动活动度方面，都优于单独跑步机训练。你可以根据患者的具体功能障碍和目标，在你的临床实践中灵活选择或组合这两种贴扎技术。
items.titleZh: Kinesio 与 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎对慢性卒中患者平衡和踝关节功能的生物力学影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 33 名慢性卒中患者的随机对照试验发现，Kinesio 贴扎结合跑步机训练以及 Mulligan 踝关节贴扎结合跑步机训练，在踝关节背屈被动活动度和其他结局方面，与单纯跑步机训练相比存在显著组间差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT of 33 chronic stroke individuals suggests that both Kinesio taping and Mulligan ankle taping, when combined with treadmill training, are superior to treadmill training alone in improving ankle dorsiflexion passive range of motion. You can flexibly choose or combine these two taping techniques in your clinical practice based on the patient's specific dysfunction and goals.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小（每组 11 人），且仅进行了六周干预，可能限制了长期效果的观察和结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: The study had a small sample size (11 participants per group) and a short six-week intervention period, which may limit the observation of long-term effects and the generalizability of results.

items.title: Monitoring an athletes performance-state after they return to sport is a significant challenge in ACL injury research and applied practice
items.summary: This commentary highlights the significant challenge of monitoring athletes' performance-state after they return to sport following ACL reconstruction, emphasizing that current return-to-sport criteria may not fully address long-term neuromuscular impairments.
items.curatedReason: 这篇述评强调了 ACL 重建术后运动员重返赛场后的表现状态监测是一个重大挑战。你不能仅仅满足于运动员通过重返运动标准，而应持续关注其长期表现和神经肌肉功能，以降低二次损伤风险并优化竞技表现。
items.titleZh: 监测运动员在重返赛场后表现状态是 ACL 损伤研究和实践中的一项重大挑战
items.summaryZh: 这篇述评强调，监测运动员在 ACL 重建术后重返赛场后的表现状态是一个重大挑战，并指出当前的重返赛场标准可能未能完全解决长期的神经肌肉功能障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This commentary highlights that monitoring athletes' performance state after returning to sport following ACL reconstruction is a significant challenge. You should not merely be satisfied with athletes passing return-to-sport criteria, but continuously monitor their long-term performance and neuromuscular function to reduce the risk of re-injury and optimize athletic performance.
items.limitation: 作为一篇述评，其主要目的是提出问题和观点，而非提供新的实证数据或系统性证据。
items.limitationEn: As a commentary, its main purpose is to raise questions and perspectives, not to provide new empirical data or systematic evidence.

items.title: Factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes following pathogen-confirmed acute respiratory infections in athletes: AWARE X study
items.summary: A prospective cohort study of 114 confirmed acute respiratory infection cases among athletes identified factors associated with return-to-sport outcomes, including illness severity, gender, and pathogen groups.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究基于 114 名运动员的数据，明确了急性呼吸道感染后重返赛场需要考量的重要因素：疾病严重程度、性别和病原体类型。作为临床医生，你在评估和指导运动员重返训练时，必须将这些因素纳入考量，以制定更个性化和安全的康复计划。
items.titleZh: 病原体确诊急性呼吸道感染后运动员重返赛场结局相关因素：AWARE X 研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 114 例确诊急性呼吸道感染运动员的前瞻性队列研究识别了与重返赛场结局相关的因素，包括疾病严重程度、性别和病原体组别。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study, based on data from 114 athletes, identifies key factors to consider for return-to-sport after acute respiratory infection: illness severity, gender, and pathogen groups. As a clinician, you must account for these factors when assessing and guiding athletes back to training to develop more personalized and safe rehabilitation plans.
items.limitation: 研究的队列规模为 114 例，相对有限，且可能存在一些未测量混杂因素。
items.limitationEn: The study's cohort size of 114 cases is relatively limited, and some unmeasured confounding factors may exist.

items.title: "Most inactive in my life": patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure.
items.summary: A qualitative study identified patient-reported barriers to cardiac rehabilitation in heart failure, including lack of motivation, discomfort, and depressive symptoms, through in-depth interviews with 22 adults.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了心力衰竭患者参与心脏康复的主要障碍。你在为心衰患者制定康复计划时，除了生理因素，还需关注其报告的障碍（如缺乏动力、不适感、抑郁症状），并采取个体化的心理社会支持策略，以提高依从性。
items.titleZh: “我一生中最不活跃的时候”：患者报告的心力衰竭心脏康复障碍
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究通过对 22 名成年患者进行深度访谈，识别了心力衰竭患者参与心脏康复的患者报告障碍，包括缺乏动力、不适感和抑郁症状。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals major barriers to cardiac rehabilitation participation for heart failure patients. When developing rehabilitation plans for heart failure patients, in addition to physiological factors, you also need to address their reported barriers (e.g., lack of motivation, discomfort, depressive symptoms) and implement individualized psychosocial support strategies to improve adherence.
items.limitation: 作为一项定性研究，样本量较小（22 名成年心力衰竭患者），结果主要提供深入的患者体验，可能不具广泛代表性。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, the sample size is small (22 adults with heart failure), and the results primarily offer in-depth patient experiences, which may not be broadly representative.

items.title: Validity and reliability of on‑site and off‑site direct observation of procedural skills (DOPS) for knee mobilization in Physical therapy education.
items.summary: A study found the direct observation of procedural skills for knee joint mobilization (DOPSknee) tool to be reliable and valid for assessing preclinical PT students' competencies in both on-site and off-site environments.
items.curatedReason: 这份研究验证了 DOPSknee 工具在膝关节松动术教学评估中的可靠性，无论线上还是线下都表现良好。你可以考虑将这种标准化评估工具引入你的临床带教和继续教育实践中，以提高评估的客观性和一致性。
items.titleZh: 膝关节松动术现场与非现场操作技能直接观察（DOPS）在物理治疗教育中的效度和信度
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，膝关节松动术的操作技能直接观察（DOPSknee）工具在评估临床前物理治疗学生的现场和非现场能力方面具有良好的信度和效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study validates the reliability of the DOPSknee tool for assessing knee joint mobilization in education, performing well both on-site and off-site. You might consider integrating such standardized assessment tools into your clinical teaching and continuing education practices to enhance evaluation objectivity and consistency.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于临床前物理治疗学生，其表现可能无法完全代表执业医师的复杂临床技能。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were limited to preclinical physical therapy students, whose performance may not fully represent the complex clinical skills of practicing clinicians.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: TRAK MSK: a randomised external feasibility trial and process evaluation of a digital physiotherapy supported self-management programme for people with musculoskeletal pain.
items.summary: A randomized external feasibility trial explored TRAK MSK, a digital physiotherapy supported self-management program for musculoskeletal pain, finding it feasible for a definitive trial and effective in enabling self-management.
items.curatedReason: TRAK MSK 数字支持的自我管理项目显示出开展确证性试验的可行性。这是一个关于数字疗法在骨骼肌肉疼痛管理中潜力的信号，你可以关注其后续的有效性研究。
items.titleZh: TRAK MSK：一项针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理项目的随机外部可行性试验和过程评估
items.summaryZh: 一项随机外部可行性试验探讨了 TRAK MSK——一个针对肌肉骨骼疼痛患者的数字物理治疗支持自我管理项目，发现其开展确证性试验是可行的，并能有效促进自我管理。
items.curatedReasonEn: The TRAK MSK digital physiotherapy self-management program demonstrates feasibility for a definitive trial. This signals the potential of digital therapeutics in musculoskeletal pain management, and you should watch for subsequent effectiveness studies.
items.limitation: 作为一项可行性研究，其主要目的是评估试验流程而非干预效果，样本量小，且未报告具体临床结局数据。
items.limitationEn: As a feasibility study, its primary aim was to evaluate trial procedures rather than intervention effectiveness, featuring a small sample size and lacking specific clinical outcome data.

items.title: Major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement: a survey among Swedish physiotherapists.
items.summary: A survey among Swedish physiotherapists found major discrepancies in recommendations regarding long-term activity restrictions following knee replacement, highlighting a lack of consistent evidence-based guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这份调查揭示了瑞典物理治疗师在膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议上的显著差异。这提醒你，当前的临床实践可能缺乏统一证据支持，你需要基于最新证据并结合个体患者情况，更明确地与患者沟通风险和预期。
items.titleZh: 膝关节置换术后长期活动限制建议的重大差异：一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查
items.summaryZh: 一项针对瑞典物理治疗师的调查发现，在膝关节置换术后长期活动限制的建议上存在重大差异，这凸显了缺乏一致的循证指导。
items.curatedReasonEn: This survey reveals significant discrepancies in long-term activity restriction recommendations among Swedish physical therapists post-knee replacement. This indicates a potential lack of unified evidence in current clinical practice, urging you to communicate risks and expectations more clearly with patients, based on the latest evidence and individual patient circumstances.
items.limitation: 研究范围仅限于瑞典的物理治疗师，其结果不一定能推广到其他国家或医疗系统。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to physical therapists in Sweden, and its findings may not be generalizable to other countries or healthcare systems.

items.title: Professional reintegration after stroke: experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors.
items.summary: A brief report exploring Portuguese stroke survivors' return-to-work experiences highlighted challenges such as managing physical and cognitive impairments, fatigue, and insufficient workplace adaptations, often in the absence of specific policies.
items.curatedReason: 卒中幸存者重返工作面临多重挑战，包括生理、认知障碍和工作场所适应性不足。作为康复医师，你在制定回归社会计划时，需要更全面地考虑这些因素，并倡导多学科合作，以提高重返工作的成功率。
items.titleZh: 卒中后专业再融入：葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验
items.summaryZh: 一份简要报告探讨了葡萄牙卒中幸存者重返工作的经验，强调了他们在应对躯体和认知障碍、疲劳以及工作场所适应性不足方面面临的挑战，通常在缺乏具体政策的情况下。
items.curatedReasonEn: Stroke survivors face multiple challenges in returning to work, including physical and cognitive impairments and inadequate workplace adaptations. As a rehabilitation clinician, you need to consider these factors more comprehensively when developing return-to-society plans and advocate for multidisciplinary collaboration to improve the success rate of return to work.
items.limitation: 该报告主要基于葡萄牙卒中幸存者的经验，其文化和社会背景可能限制结果对其他人群的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This report is primarily based on the experiences of Portuguese stroke survivors, and its cultural and social context may limit the generalizability of findings to other populations.

items.title: Incomplete Cognitive Assessment in Post-Acute Stroke Rehabilitation: Recovering Clinically Interpretable Relationships from Routine Neuropsychological Data.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study of 2654 post-acute stroke neuro-rehabilitation patients demonstrated that incomplete routine cognitive assessments can still yield clinically interpretable relationships among cognitive, clinical, and contextual variables.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，即使卒中后急性期认知评估不完整，也能从常规神经心理学数据中提取有临床意义的关系。这意味着你不必追求完美的数据完整性，而可以利用现有数据进行分层和关系探索，但需要注意由此带来的局限性。
items.titleZh: 卒中急性后期康复中不完整的认知评估：从常规神经心理学数据中恢复临床可解释的关系
items.summaryZh: 一项对 2654 名卒中急性后期神经康复患者进行的回顾性队列研究表明，不完整的常规认知评估仍能揭示认知、临床和背景变量之间具有临床可解释的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that even with incomplete cognitive assessments in post-acute stroke, clinically interpretable relationships can be derived from routine neuropsychological data. This means you don't need to aim for perfect data completeness; instead, you can leverage existing data for stratification and relationship exploration, while being mindful of the inherent limitations.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性研究，可能存在数据缺失模式带来的偏倚，且无法控制所有混杂变量。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective study, potentially subject to bias from missing data patterns and unable to control for all confounding variables.

items.title: Enhanced Gait Variability Index in Neurological and Geriatric Rehabilitation: A Scoping Review.
items.summary: A scoping review mapped the application of the Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) in neurological and geriatric rehabilitation, characterizing populations and clinical contexts, and identifying methodological gaps.
items.curatedReason: 增强步态变异性指数（eGVI）作为评估神经和老年人群跌倒风险的综合指标，在临床实践中潜力巨大。这份综述总结了其应用场景，你可以根据其结果，考虑在评估中引入 eGVI，但需注意目前证据中评估方案的异质性，以确保规范化使用。
items.titleZh: 增强步态变异性指数在神经和老年康复中的应用：一项范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述绘制了增强步态变异性指数（eGVI）在神经和老年康复中的应用情况，描述了人群和临床背景，并识别了方法学空白。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Enhanced Gait Variability Index (eGVI) shows significant potential as a comprehensive indicator for assessing fall risk in neurological and geriatric populations. Based on this review, you might consider incorporating eGVI into your assessments, but pay attention to the heterogeneity of assessment protocols in current evidence to ensure standardized use.
items.limitation: 作为一项范围综述，它主要侧重于文献映射，而非对 eGVI 在不同人群中的具体疗效或预测价值进行系统评估。
items.limitationEn: As a scoping review, it primarily focuses on mapping the literature rather than systematically evaluating the specific efficacy or predictive value of eGVI in different populations.

items.title: "If you don't sort out these problems, you end up building problems": a qualitative study exploring mouthcare at home with people with Parkinson's and their partners in care.
items.summary: A qualitative study exploring mouthcare experiences of 13 people with Parkinson's and 7 partners in care identified motor and non-motor barriers, including reduced dexterity, fatigue, and apathy, affecting home mouthcare.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了帕金森病患者在家中进行口腔护理的障碍，包括运动和非运动症状。你在评估和制定帕金森患者的日常生活活动（ADL）干预计划时，应将口腔护理纳入考量，并为患者及照护者提供更具体的策略支持。
items.titleZh: “如果你不解决这些问题，最终就会制造出更多问题”：一项关于帕金森病患者及其照护者在家中口腔护理的定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项探讨 13 名帕金森病患者和 7 名照护者口腔护理经验的定性研究发现，运动和非运动障碍（包括灵活性下降、疲劳和冷漠）影响了家庭口腔护理。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study reveals barriers to mouthcare for people with Parkinson's at home, including motor and non-motor symptoms. When assessing and developing ADL intervention plans for Parkinson's patients, you should include mouthcare considerations and provide more specific strategic support for patients and caregivers.
items.limitation: 作为一项定性研究，样本量较小（20 人），其发现可能不具有广泛的代表性，更多提供深入的经验而非量化结论。
items.limitationEn: As a qualitative study, the sample size is small (20 individuals), so its findings may not be broadly representative, providing in-depth experiences rather than quantitative conclusions.

items.title: Early Weight-Bearing Speeds Recovery After Unstable Ankle Fracture Surgery: study
items.summary: A study by Mohammadhadi Mollaabbasi et al. published in “JBJS Open Access” found that early weight-bearing (EWB) and mobilization significantly improve functional outcomes, rehabilitation progress, and complication rates following surgical fixation of unstable ankle fractures.
items.curatedReason: 不稳定踝关节骨折术后早期负重，能加速患者恢复。在临床实践中，考虑根据患者情况，推行早期负重和早期活动策略，以优化康复进展并改善功能预后。
items.titleZh: 研究：不稳定踝关节骨折术后早期负重可加速恢复
items.summaryZh: Mohammadhadi Mollaabbasi 等人发表在《JBJS Open Access》上的一项研究发现，不稳定踝关节骨折手术内固定后，早期负重（EWB）和早期活动能显著改善功能预后、康复进展和并发症发生率。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early weight-bearing after unstable ankle fracture surgery can accelerate patient recovery. In clinical practice, consider implementing early weight-bearing and early mobilization strategies based on patient condition to optimize rehabilitation progress and improve functional outcomes.
items.limitation: 新闻稿未提供原始研究的具体数据（如样本量、具体效应量或随访时间），难以评估证据强度。
items.limitationEn: The news release does not provide specific data from the original study (e.g., sample size, specific effect sizes, or follow-up duration), making it difficult to assess the strength of the evidence.

items.title: Pelvic floor muscle training for pelvic organ prolapse: A systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: This systematic review and meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials evaluated the efficacy of pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) for pelvic organ prolapse (POP).
items.curatedReason: 盆底肌训练（PFMT）对盆腔器官脱垂（POP）有效且有中等质量证据支持。在临床实践中，你应该将 PFMT 作为 POP 患者的一线保守治疗方案。
items.titleZh: 盆底肌训练治疗盆腔器官脱垂：一项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验的系统综述和荟萃分析评估了盆底肌训练（PFMT）治疗盆腔器官脱垂（POP）的疗效。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pelvic floor muscle training (PFMT) is effective for pelvic organ prolapse (POP) and supported by moderate-quality evidence. In clinical practice, you should consider PFMT as a first-line conservative treatment for POP patients.
items.limitation: 作为系统综述和荟萃分析，其结论的强度取决于纳入研究的质量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: As a systematic review and meta-analysis, the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality and heterogeneity of the included studies.

items.title: Effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia: a systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis | Journal of NeuroEngineering and Rehabilitation
items.summary: A systematic review and Bayesian network meta-analysis evaluated the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia.
items.curatedReason: 这份贝叶斯网络荟萃分析证实了卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍非药物干预的有效性。在为患者制定下肢康复方案时，请优先考虑这些有强证据支持的方法。
items.titleZh: 非药物干预对卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的有效性：一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和贝叶斯网络荟萃分析评估了非药物干预对卒中后偏瘫下肢运动障碍的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This Bayesian network meta-analysis confirms the effectiveness of non-pharmacological interventions for lower limb motor impairment in post-stroke hemiplegia. When developing rehabilitation plans for these patients, prioritize these strongly evidenced methods.
items.limitation: 网络荟萃分析的证据强度取决于纳入原始研究的质量和异质性，可能存在某些干预缺乏直接比较的局限。
items.limitationEn: The strength of evidence from a network meta-analysis depends on the quality and heterogeneity of the included original studies, and there might be limitations where certain interventions lack direct comparisons.

items.title: Effects of exercise on physical function and pain in adults with rheumatoid arthritis: an exit meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials
items.summary: This meta-analysis of randomized controlled trials investigated the effects of exercise on physical function and pain in adults with rheumatoid arthritis, building on previous guidelines.
items.curatedReason: 本项荟萃分析证实了运动对类风湿关节炎患者身体功能和疼痛的积极影响。这意味着，在你的临床实践中，应将运动疗法作为类风湿关节炎患者管理的核心部分。
items.titleZh: 运动对类风湿关节炎成人身体功能和疼痛的影响：一项随机对照试验的荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验的荟萃分析研究了运动对类风湿关节炎成人身体功能和疼痛的影响，进一步支持了现有指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis confirms the positive effects of exercise on physical function and pain in adults with rheumatoid arthritis. This implies that in your clinical practice, exercise therapy should be a core component of managing patients with rheumatoid arthritis.
items.limitation: 虽是荟萃分析，但未提及纳入研究的异质性、具体的样本量或效应量，可能影响结果的解读。
items.limitationEn: Although a meta-analysis, it does not mention the heterogeneity of included studies, specific sample sizes, or effect sizes, which may affect the interpretation of the results.

items.title: Immediate Weight-Bearing and Early Ambulation Rehabilitation After Femoral Neck System Fixation for Undisplaced Femoral Neck Fractures: A Prospective Randomized Controlled Trial
items.summary: A prospective randomized controlled trial investigated the clinical and functional outcomes of immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures.
items.curatedReason: 股骨颈系统内固定治疗无移位股骨颈骨折后，立即负重和早期活动能带来良好的临床和功能预后。你应该在临床实践中，根据患者具体情况，积极推行早期康复方案。
items.titleZh: 股骨颈系统内固定治疗无移位股骨颈骨折后立即负重和早期活动康复：一项前瞻性随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性随机对照试验调查了股骨颈系统内固定治疗无移位股骨颈骨折后，立即负重和早期活动康复的临床和功能预后。
items.curatedReasonEn: Immediate weight-bearing and early ambulation rehabilitation after femoral neck system fixation for undisplaced femoral neck fractures lead to good clinical and functional outcomes. You should actively promote early rehabilitation protocols in clinical practice, tailored to the patient's specific condition.
items.limitation: 作为单中心RCT，其结果在其他人群和临床环境中的普适性可能需要进一步验证。未提及具体样本量和效应量。
items.limitationEn: As a single-center RCT, its generalizability to other populations and clinical settings may require further validation. Specific sample size and effect sizes are not mentioned.

items.title: Prehabilitation Improves Surgical Outcomes in Older Adults Undergoing Spinal Fusion: Study
items.summary: A study found that prehabilitation improves surgical outcomes in older adults undergoing spinal fusion surgery, highlighting the benefits of pre-operative rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 高龄成人脊柱融合术前的康复训练（prehabilitation）能改善手术预后。这意味着你应该积极将术前康复纳入高龄脊柱手术患者的路径管理，以优化他们的恢复。
items.titleZh: 研究：术前康复改善高龄成人脊柱融合术后预后
items.summaryZh: 一项研究发现，对接受脊柱融合术的高龄成人进行术前康复能改善手术预后，强调了术前康复的益处。
items.curatedReasonEn: Prehabilitation before spinal fusion surgery in older adults improves surgical outcomes. This means you should actively integrate pre-rehabilitation into the pathway management of older spinal surgery patients to optimize their recovery.
items.limitation: 新闻稿未提供原始研究的具体数据（如样本量、具体效应量或随访时间），难以评估证据强度。
items.limitationEn: The news release does not provide specific data from the original study (e.g., sample size, specific effect sizes, or follow-up duration), making it difficult to assess the strength of the evidence.

items.title: Effect of pain neuroscience education on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder: a randomized controlled trial
items.summary: This randomized controlled trial investigated the effect of pain neuroscience education (PNE) on pain, kinesiophobia, disability, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder.
items.curatedReason: 疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）对肩周炎患者的疼痛、恐惧运动和生活质量有积极影响。你可以考虑在肩周炎患者的康复方案中，整合 PNE 作为辅助干预。
items.titleZh: 疼痛神经科学教育对肩周炎患者疼痛、恐惧运动、功能障碍和生活质量的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 这项随机对照试验旨在调查疼痛神经科学教育（PNE）对肩周炎患者的疼痛、恐惧运动、功能障碍和生活质量的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: Pain Neuroscience Education (PNE) positively impacts pain, kinesiophobia, and quality of life in patients with frozen shoulder. You might consider integrating PNE as an adjunct intervention in rehabilitation protocols for frozen shoulder patients.
items.limitation: 作为单中心RCT，其结果在其他人群和临床环境中的普适性可能需要进一步验证。未提及具体样本量和效应量。
items.limitationEn: As a single-center RCT, its generalizability to other populations and clinical settings may require further validation. Specific sample size and effect sizes are not mentioned.

items.title: Biokinetic insights into the hip–spine relationship: no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain
items.summary: This study investigated the hip–spine relationship, finding no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究发现，髋关节力量或柔韧性与腰痛患者的骨盆运动改变无相关性。这提示你，在评估腰痛患者时，不应过度强调髋关节的生物力学参数与骨盆运动的直接因果关系。
items.titleZh: 髋-脊关系生物动力学洞察：髋关节力量或柔韧性与腰痛患者骨盆运动改变无相关性
items.summaryZh: 这项研究深入探讨了髋-脊关系，发现髋关节力量或柔韧性与腰痛患者的骨盆运动改变之间没有相关性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study found no correlation between hip strength or flexibility and altered pelvic motion in patients with low back pain. This suggests that when evaluating patients with low back pain, you should not overemphasize a direct causal relationship between hip biomechanical parameters and pelvic motion.
items.limitation: 作为观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，且未提及具体样本量和纳入人群特征，可能限制结论的普适性。
items.limitationEn: As an observational study, it cannot establish causality, and the specific sample size and characteristics of the included population are not mentioned, potentially limiting the generalizability of the conclusions.

items.title: Mattress impact on lifestyle and back pain: a 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline
items.summary: This 25-year orthopedic literature review guideline systematically evaluated the impact of mattress type on sleep quality and musculoskeletal discomfort, including low back pain, morning stiffness, and shoulder discomfort.
items.curatedReason: 关于床垫对腰痛影响的综述，强调了睡眠表面对睡眠质量和肌肉骨骼症状的重要性。你可以向患者提供基于证据的建议，以改善睡眠环境，减轻腰背部不适。
items.titleZh: 床垫对生活方式和腰痛的影响：一项25年骨科文献综述指南
items.summaryZh: 这项涵盖25年骨科文献的综述指南系统评估了床垫类型对睡眠质量和肌肉骨骼不适（包括腰痛、晨僵和肩部不适）的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review on the impact of mattresses on back pain highlights the importance of sleeping surfaces for sleep quality and musculoskeletal symptoms. You can provide evidence-based recommendations to patients to improve their sleep environment and alleviate low back discomfort.
items.limitation: 作为文献综述，其结论的强度取决于纳入研究的质量，且可能存在发表偏倚。
items.limitationEn: As a literature review, the strength of its conclusions depends on the quality of the included studies, and publication bias may exist.

items.title: The impact of anxiety/depression symptoms on return to work in patients with chronic neck or back pain: a longitudinal cohort study from the Norwegian neck and back registry
items.summary: A longitudinal cohort study from the Norwegian neck and back registry investigated the impact of anxiety/depression symptoms on return to work in patients with chronic neck or back pain, identifying them as leading causes of non-fatal health loss.
items.curatedReason: 焦虑/抑郁症状会显著影响慢性颈痛或腰痛患者的重返工作能力。这意味着，在康复方案中，你需要将患者的心理健康筛查和必要时的心理支持或转诊，纳入综合评估和管理。
items.titleZh: 焦虑/抑郁症状对慢性颈痛或腰痛患者重返工作的影响：一项挪威颈背部登记的纵向队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项来自挪威颈背部登记的纵向队列研究调查了焦虑/抑郁症状对慢性颈痛或腰痛患者重返工作的影响，指出这些症状是非致命健康损失的主要原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: Anxiety/depression symptoms significantly impact the return-to-work ability of patients with chronic neck or back pain. This means you need to integrate mental health screening and, if necessary, psychological support or referral into your comprehensive assessment and management for these patients.
items.limitation: 作为队列研究，可能存在混杂因素影响重返工作结果，且其在挪威人群中的发现，外推至其他文化和医疗系统可能需要谨慎。
items.limitationEn: As a cohort study, confounding factors may influence return-to-work outcomes, and its findings in the Norwegian population may require caution when extrapolating to other cultures and healthcare systems.

items.title: Efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia: a randomized, single-blind, controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized, single-blind, controlled trial investigated the efficacy and safety of immersive, sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training for post-stroke dysphagia.
items.curatedReason: 浸式 sEMG 触发的虚拟现实游戏训练，作为卒中后吞咽困难的新疗法，表现出不错的效果和安全性。这提示你可以将此技术作为传统治疗无效患者的一种有前景的替代或补充干预手段。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式、sEMG触发的虚拟现实游戏训练治疗卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性：一项随机、单盲、对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、单盲、对照试验调查了沉浸式、sEMG触发的虚拟现实游戏训练治疗卒中后吞咽困难的疗效和安全性。
items.curatedReasonEn: Immersive sEMG-triggered virtual reality game training shows promising efficacy and safety for post-stroke dysphagia. You might consider this as a viable alternative or supplementary intervention for patients who don't respond to traditional treatments.
items.limitation: 作为单盲随机对照试验，未提及具体样本量和关键效应量，且其长期效果和在更大人群中的普适性仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: As a single-blind randomized controlled trial, specific sample size and key effect sizes are not mentioned, and its long-term effects and generalizability in larger populations still require further validation.

items.title: The use of focus of attention for instruction and feedback during telehealth physiotherapy: An observational study.
items.summary: An observational study explored pediatric physiotherapists' use of focus of attention (FOA) for instructions and feedback during telehealth sessions with 12 clients with neurodevelopmental disorders, involving six physiotherapists from two therapy centers.
items.curatedReason: 儿科远程物理治疗的注意力焦点（FOA）使用模式，这项观察性研究提供了初步见解。了解 FOA 在远程环境中的实际应用，能帮你优化线上指导策略。
items.titleZh: 远程物理治疗中注意力焦点用于指导和反馈的观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项观察性研究探索了儿科物理治疗师在远程治疗期间，对12名神经发育障碍患儿进行指导和反馈时，注意力焦点（FOA）的使用情况。研究涉及两家治疗中心的6名物理治疗师。
items.curatedReasonEn: This observational study offers initial insights into the use of focus of attention (FOA) during pediatric telehealth physiotherapy. Understanding actual FOA application in remote settings can help you optimize your online instruction strategies.
items.limitation: 本研究为探索性观察性设计，样本量小（6名物理治疗师、12名客户），且仅限于首都地区的两家治疗中心，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This exploratory observational study has a small sample size (6 physiotherapists, 12 clients) and is limited to two therapy centers in a capital region, thus limiting generalizability.

items.title: Early-Stage Symptomatic Hip Osteoarthritis: A Window of Opportunity.
items.summary: This article discusses the growing prevalence of hip osteoarthritis (OA) in young adults and highlights the importance of early identification and intervention, noting that early stages may offer the best chance to alter disease trajectory, an area that has received less attention than knee OA.
items.curatedReason: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎的识别和干预，是髋关节 OA 管理中一个越来越受关注的窗口期。这篇文章强调了早期诊断和治疗的重要性，以及目前髋关节 OA 领域与膝关节 OA 领域在关注度上的差距。
items.titleZh: 早期症状性髋关节骨关节炎：一个干预的窗口期
items.summaryZh: 本文探讨了年轻成人髋关节骨关节炎（OA）日益增长的患病率，并强调了早期识别和干预的重要性，指出早期阶段可能是改变疾病轨迹的最佳时机，但该领域受到的关注少于膝关节OA。
items.curatedReasonEn: Identifying and intervening in early-stage symptomatic hip osteoarthritis (OA) is a growing area of focus in hip OA management. This article highlights the importance of early diagnosis and treatment and the current disparity in attention between hip OA and knee OA.
items.journal: The Journal of orthopaedic and sports physical therapy

items.title: Sudden cardiac arrest preparedness in African football: evidence from Cameroon and implications for global sport
items.summary: A cross-sectional survey during the 2024/2025 season assessed the knowledge, attitudes, and practices of professional football stakeholders in Cameroon regarding sudden cardiac arrest (SCA) preparedness, identifying system-level gaps in low-resource sport settings.
items.curatedReason: 非洲足球运动中猝死（SCA）的准备情况评估，揭示了低资源环境下体系层面存在的关键差距。这提醒你，在全球体育运动中，尤其是在资源受限地区，SCA 预防和应对方案仍需加强。
items.titleZh: 非洲足球中猝死的准备情况：喀麦隆的证据及对全球体育的影响
items.summaryZh: 一项在2024/2025赛季进行的横断面调查评估了喀麦隆职业足球利益相关者对猝死（SCA）准备情况的知识、态度和实践，旨在识别低资源体育环境中的体系层面差距。
items.curatedReasonEn: The assessment of sudden cardiac arrest (SCA) preparedness in African football reveals critical systemic gaps in low-resource settings. This reminds you that SCA prevention and response protocols need strengthening in global sports, especially in resource-limited regions.
items.limitation: 本研究为横断面调查，依赖自我报告，可能存在回忆偏倚和报告偏倚；研究人群仅限于喀麦隆职业足球利益相关者，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This cross-sectional survey relies on self-reports, potentially leading to recall and reporting bias; the study population is limited to professional football stakeholders in Cameroon, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Pelvic Floor Knowledge and Dysfunctions in Female Athletes: Impact of Demographics, Sport Profile, and Physical Activity - International Urogynecology Journal
items.summary: This study investigated pelvic floor knowledge and dysfunctions in female athletes, examining the impact of demographics, sport profile, and physical activity, noting that high-impact sports participation may exacerbate pelvic floor dysfunctions (PFDs).
items.curatedReason: 高强度运动可能加剧女性运动员的盆底功能障碍 (PFDs)。提示我们，对这类人群的盆底健康需要额外重视，应加强相关知识宣教和早期筛查。
items.titleZh: 女性运动员盆底知识和功能障碍：人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动的影响
items.summaryZh: 这项研究调查了女性运动员的盆底知识和功能障碍，探讨了人口统计学、运动特征和身体活动的影响，指出高强度运动参与可能会加剧盆底功能障碍（PFD）。
items.curatedReasonEn: High-impact sports may exacerbate pelvic floor dysfunctions (PFDs) in female athletes. This suggests you should prioritize pelvic floor health in this population, enhancing education and early screening efforts.
items.limitation: 作为观察性研究，无法建立因果关系，且该文为短摘要，未提供具体研究设计和样本量等信息。

items.curatedReason: APTA 此次联手 Hartford HealthCare 开展衰弱试点项目，明确了一个信号：物理治疗在价值医疗体系中的地位正日益巩固。留意你所在区域是否有这类预示 PT 市场机会的整合性项目，尤其是针对老年衰弱的预防和管理。
items.titleZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 启动衰弱试点项目，推进价值医疗
items.summaryZh: APTA 与 Hartford HealthCare 合作启动一项衰弱试点项目，旨在推进价值医疗，突显了物理治疗在预防和整合健康模型中日益增长的作用。
items.curatedReasonEn: This APTA-Hartford HealthCare frailty pilot solidifies physical therapy's growing role within value-based care models. Keep an eye out for similar integrated programs in your market, especially those targeting geriatric frailty prevention and management, as they signal direct PT opportunities.

items.title: Correction: ACTIVATE: physical activity assessment, prescription and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals - a consensus study initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy
items.summary: A correction was issued for the ACTIVATE consensus study, which focused on physical activity assessment, prescription, and promotion in clinical practice by healthcare professionals, initiated by the International Federation of Sports Physical Therapy. Reference 57 has been corrected.
items.curatedReason: 作为物理治疗师，ACTIVATE 共识研究为你在临床实践中评估、开具和促进患者体育活动提供了框架。该更正确保了引用的准确性，但对核心建议无实质影响。
items.titleZh: 更正：ACTIVATE：国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的关于医疗专业人员在临床实践中评估、开具和促进体育活动的共识研究
items.summaryZh: 国际运动物理治疗联合会发起的一项关于医疗专业人员在临床实践中评估、开具和促进体育活动的 ACTIVATE 共识研究发布了更正，其中参考文献 57 已被修正。
items.curatedReasonEn: As a physical therapist, the ACTIVATE consensus study provides a framework for assessing, prescribing, and promoting physical activity in clinical practice. This correction ensures citation accuracy but does not alter the core recommendations.
